headline: AM Best Assigns Issue Credit Rating to Humana Inc.’s New Junior Subordinated Notes
summary: OLDWICK, N.J., March 06, 2026--AM Best has assigned a Long-Term Issue Credit Rating of "bbb-" (Good) to the $1 billion, 6.625% fixed rate junior subordinated notes, due 2056, of Humana Inc. (Humana) (headquartered in Louisville, KY) [NYSE: HUM]. The outlook assigned to this Credit Rating (rating) is stable. All other ratings of Humana and its subsidiaries remain unchanged.

headline: Reported Earlier, Humana Prices $1.0B Fixed-To-Fixed Rate Junior Subordinated Notes Offering Due 2056, Net Proceeds Expected At ~$986M

headline: Humana Prices $1.0 Billion Fixed-to-Fixed Rate Junior Subordinated Notes Offering
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., March 06, 2026--Humana Inc. (the "company") (NYSE: HUM) announced today that it has priced a public offering of $1.0 billion in aggregate principal amount of fixed-to-fixed rate junior subordinated notes due 2056, at 100.000 percent of the principal amount (the "Junior Subordinated Notes Offering"). The Junior Subordinated Notes Offering is expected to close on March 9, 2026, subject to the satisfaction of customary closing conditions.
